name: Cinnamon Breakfast Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Melted butter or butter substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder into a bowl.
2. Add salt to the mixture.
3. Stir in brown sugar and shortening with two spatulas until combined.
4. Beat egg separately, then add it to the mixture along with milk, ensuring a soft dough forms.
5. Mix in raisins.
6. Grease and flour a cake tin.
7. Pour melted butter over the batter.
8. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon.
9. Bake at 435°F (220°C) for 20-25 minutes.
